response.overview: Reload is a drama based on the true story of Francois de Jager. It follows a young man battling a tumultuous upbringing, leading to a life of addiction, gang violence, and homelessness. After a near-fatal downward spiral, a chance encounter with a church leads to his rehabilitation and a new life in ministry.
response.tagline: Broken by life. Reloaded by grace.
response.title: Reload
